subject: math
activity_templates: A kindergarten shapes identification worksheet. Six large cute cartoon shapes (circle, square, triangle, rectangle, oval, star) each with a small label line underneath to write the shape name. {{character}} points at the circle.
A trace-the-shape worksheet with dotted outlines of five shapes (circle, square, triangle, rectangle, heart) for the child to trace. {{character}} holds a giant pencil.

A color-the-shape worksheet: a grid of 2D shapes mixed with cute cartoon objects of the same shape (ball = circle, window = square). Child colors the matching pair. {{character}} smiles in the corner.

A shape counting worksheet: a silly cartoon scene made entirely of basic shapes, and below the scene the child counts how many circles, squares, and triangles they see. {{character}} stands next to the scene.
